title: deparia lancea
intro: Deparia lancea, also known as the lady fern or lance-leaf lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Deparia lancea include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Deparia lancea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the leaves typically being used in these preparations.
